name: find-read
description: Find files by name pattern(s) and read or grep them in one step, merging find+cat or find+grep into 1 call.

parameters.name: --name
parameters.description: File name glob pattern (repeatable for OR matching)

parameters.name: --limit
parameters.description: Maximum files to read or grep

parameters.name: --names-only
parameters.description: Only print matching file paths, do not read

parameters.name: --grep
parameters.description: Content pattern to search within matched files

examples.expected: Finds and reads up to 5 .ts/.js files in /app/packages

cost_saving_rationale: Merges file-finding and file-reading/grepping into 1 step instead of 2+ sequential steps per batch.
